description.description: Short visual description for the INPUT_DECL 'Reference B = ...' / 'Reference C = ...' line — what is physically shown on the reference image. Falls back to `purpose` if empty.

purpose.description: Semantic role for the REFERENCE PRIORITY 'Reference B provides ...' / 'Reference C provides ...' line — what the reference contributes to generation (e.g. environment, atmospheric scene)

conflict_tail_descriptor.description: Optional single-word descriptor injected into the REFERENCE PRIORITY conflict clause (e.g. 'atmospheric')
